hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ]; then case "$FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) npx eslint --fix "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.py) python -m ruff check --fix "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || python -m black "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.go) gofmt -w "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; fi; exit 0

if [ -f package.json ]; then TEST_SCRIPT=$(jq -r '.scripts.test // empty' package.json); if [ -n "$TEST_SCRIPT" ] && [ "$TEST_SCRIPT" != 'null' ]; then npm test 2>&1; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo 'Tests are failing. Fix tests before completing the task.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; elif [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ]; then if command -v pytest >/dev/null 2>&1; then pytest --tb=short 2>&1; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo 'Tests are failing. Fix tests before completing the task.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then go test ./... 2>&1; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo 'Tests are failing. Fix tests before completing the task.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0
